query:
INSERT INTO products (name, basePrice, description, fabricType, productType) VALUES 
('140g Unisex T-shirt (Crew Neck)', 85.00, '100% Carded Cotton, 140gm crew neck unisex t-shirt', '100% Carded Cotton, 140gm', 'Crew Neck'),
('145g Adults Unisex Dri-Fit Golfer', 150.00, '100% bird mesh polyester, 140gm dry fit golfer shirt', '100% bird mesh polyester, 140gm', 'Semi-fitted Dry Fit'),
('160g V-neck Adults Unisex T-shirt', 100.00, '100% carded cotton, 160gm v-neck t-shirt', '100% carded cotton, 160gm', 'V-Neck'),
('260g Adults Unisex Hoodie', 300.00, '100% brushed cotton anti-pill fleece, 260gm hoodie', '100% brushed cotton anti-pill fleece, 260gm', 'Crew Neck Hoodie');
